runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split last time, hitting the frame with a 2.5 lengths third (30.06) at Geelong and making it two placings on end. More than capable and well placed to find his best form.

runners.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last outing finished 5th over 520m at Geelong beaten 5.5 lengths (30.35) behind Mav Reiko in a Special conditions H on April 10. Must be included.

runners.formComment: Lifted to win two runs back and got the cash again last start over 525m at The Meadows (30.36,) beating Paw Qwerty. Looks well placed to make it three straight.

runners.formComment: Good performance to win by 3 lengths at Warragul over 460m (25.98) beating Minh Teddy in Grade 4/5 on April 7. Can't recommend in this field.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (29.85) when fifth over 515m at this track in a Mix 3/4. Has one win and four placings from six starts from the draw. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warragul over 460m. Last start finished 4th on April 9 over 515m at this track behind Valenzuela beaten 4.5 lengths (29.69) in a Mix 3/4. Has clocked a blistering 29.23 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.
